channel.title: Vanward Bound
channel.description: Fresh takes for van dwellers and weekend overlanders.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in routes with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest routes adjustments that van dwellers and weekend overlanders report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: van solar power setup
item.description: The persistent myths around van solar power setup, stress-tested against what van dwellers and weekend overlanders actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your builds in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying builds project for van dwellers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/overlanding is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the cooking community this week.

item.title: The routes checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified routes purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of power
item.description: The most common early stumbles in power, and the cheap corrections that fix them for van dwellers and weekend overlanders.

item.title: "best van life routes" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about best van life routes through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your cooking questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the cooking questions van dwellers and weekend overlanders keep asking, minus the hedging.
